Describe the sequence of scenes and empty intervals observed in the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a person sits on the bank facing away from the camera; at 4s, the scene becomes empty briefly; at 6s, two people stand in the shallow stream together; at 10s, the view clears again; at 12s, the pair stands on the rocky bank near the water.

question: Describe the actions and locations of the people visible in the clips.
canonical_answer: At 2s, an individual in white sits by the water holding an object; at 6s, two people appear standing in the riverbed; at 8s, they remain in the water with foliage behind; at 12s, they move to stand on the rocky bank; at 16s, they are still positioned on the bank.
